masterClasses.title: How to Design Forms Like an Expert
masterClasses.description: Improve your form UX and drive business success. Learn from Zoltan Kollin how to design effective, user-friendly forms that convert.

masterClasses.title: Design for AI Agents: Healthcare and High-Stakes Systems
masterClasses.description: Discover how UX design enhances AI agents in healthcare and high-stakes systems, ensuring user-friendly experiences that improve outcomes and efficiency.

masterClasses.title: Bring AI into Your Design System: Hands-On Workshop
masterClasses.description: Join our hands-on workshop to learn how to seamlessly incorporate AI into your design system. Transform your creative process and boost your efficiency

masterClasses.title: Accessible Typography: Design UIs All Your Users Will Love to Use
masterClasses.description: Discover accessible typography strategies for web and UI design. Enhance readability and user experience for all audiences.

masterClasses.title: Design KPIs: From Insights to Impact
masterClasses.description: Discover the impact of Design KPIs in this Master Class with Vitaly Friedman. Elevate your design metrics expertise and drive design success.
